revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十一]][[zh:四月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 11|qq=April 11}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 1st Year (leap 4th month) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|923|en|923|qid=Q30108|lt=923 AD|1=923}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} to {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} .{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1190|en|1190|qid=Q19736|lt=1190 AD|1=1190}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}} ) – In order to avoid the misfortune of the “three harmonies,” the era was changed from {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} to {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} . * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856 AD|1=1856}} {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}} ) – The Edo Shogunate established a {{ill|naval training center|ja|軍艦操練所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/naval training center|1=Gunkan-sō renjo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11637451}} in Tsukiji, Tokyo; later, it became the {{ill|Imperial Japanese Naval Academy|en|Imperial Japanese Naval Academy|qid=Q2238519|lt=Naval Academy|1=Imperial Japanese Naval Academy}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868 AD|1=1868}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|qid=Q2547|lt=May 3|1=May 3}} ) – The bloodless surrender of Edo ({{ill|Edo no Kesshō|ja|江戸無血開城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo no Kesshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸開城|1=Fall of Edo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q715559}} ) took place; imperial forces entered the city, and {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} withdrew to Mito. == Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597 AD|1=1597}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – {{ill|Senhime|en|Senhime|qid=Q1147080|lt=Senhime|1=Senhime}} , as recorded in ''幕府祚胤伝'' (although, according to Yamashina Genkei’s diary ''言経卿記'' for Keichō 2nd Year, May 14, the date is given as May 10), was the wife of [[Toyotomi Hideyori]]{{efn|Toyotomi Hideyori|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} (died {{ill|1666|en|1666|qid=Q7585|lt=1666 AD|1=1666}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 17th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1640|en|1640|qid=Q6901|lt=1640 AD|1=1640}} {{ill|May 31|en|May 31|qid=Q2591|lt=May 31|1=May 31}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Masachika|en|Matsudaira Masachika|qid=Q6788037|lt=Matsudaira Masachika|1=Matsudaira Masachika}} , lord of the {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|qid=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain|1=Fukui Domain}} (died {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711 AD|1=1711}} ). * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782 AD|1=1782}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) – {{ill|Hirose Tansō|en|Hirose Tansō|qid=Q1620267|lt=Hirose Tansō|1=Hirose Tansō}} , a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856 AD|1=1856}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839 AD|1=1839}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – {{ill|Nagakura Shinpachi|en|Nagakura Shinpachi|qid=Q701764|lt=Nagakura Shinpachi|1=Nagakura Shinpachi}} , a member of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|qid=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} (died {{ill|1915|en|1915|qid=Q2084|lt=1915 AD|1=1915}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865 AD|1=1865}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}} ) – {{ill|Ishii Jūji|ja|石井十次|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishii Jūji|1=Jūji Ishii|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11584896}} , a social entrepreneur who established an orphan education association (died {{ill|1914|en|1914|qid=Q2083|lt=1914 AD|1=1914}} ). == Deaths == * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|189|en|189|qid=Q33053|lt=189 AD|1=189}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Ling of Han|en|Emperor Ling of Han|qid=Q7299|lt=Lingdi Emperor|1=Emperor Ling of Han}} , the 12th emperor of the {{ill|Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|en|Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|qid=Q7209|lt=Later Han|1=Han dynasty}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} (born {{ill|156|en|156|qid=Q24594|lt=156 AD|1=156}} ). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737 AD|1=1737}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Nakamikado|en|Emperor Nakamikado|qid=Q314817|lt=Emperor Nakamikado|1=Emperor Nakamikado}} , the 114th emperor (born {{ill|1701|en|1701|qid=Q6814|lt=1701 AD|1=1701}} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|10|4|12|3|11|5|4|0411|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:4 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:April 11 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 4월 11일]] [[ja:4月11日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月十一]]
[[ar:April 11 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月十一]]
